{% if !has_summary %}
No text-bearing primary records were observed in the last {{ duration }}.
The summariser skips records where data is a bare number or data["value"] is numeric — those are telemetry measurements meant for the Trends view.
{% else %}
Summary window: {{ duration }} {% if max_sentences == 0 %} · sized: auto {% else %} · max sentences: {{ max_sentences }} {% endif %}
{{ summary }}
{% endif %}
